title: Implement OpenAI provider (replace dev stub)
intent: Replace the OpenAI provider dev stub with a real implementation that calls the Chat Completions API via the network adapter, retrieves the API key from SecretStore, and returns a proper LlmInferResult. Follow the established Anthropic provider pattern.
acceptance_criteria: executeLlmInfer calls adapters.network.fetchHttp() to POST to api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions
Request body maps prompt to OpenAI messages[] format with Bearer token auth
Response parses choices[].message.content into content string
Usage metadata (prompt_tokens, completion_tokens) mapped to LlmInferResult.usage
No stub field in return value
Handler registered in CLI demo.ts buildHandlerMap() and desktop main/index.ts buildDesktopHandlerMap()
Provider test suite follows ANT-U pattern
